hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Yamagata Zao Pension Apron Stage in Kaminoyama offers family rooms with private bathrooms. Each room includes air-conditioning, a work desk, and free WiFi.
Dining and Leisure: The modern restaurant serves Japanese, local, and European cuisines. Guests can enjoy breakfast with local specialities, warm dishes, cheese, and fruits. The property features a sun terrace, garden, and barbecue area.
Convenient Facilities: The guest house provides ski-to-door access, an indoor play area, and a coffee shop. Additional amenities include a shuttle service, ski pass sales point, and ski storage.
Local Attractions: Zao Onsen Ski Resort is 2.3 km away, and Yamagata Airport is 34 km from the property. The surrounding area includes a hot spring area.

hotels.description_en:
Spacious Holiday Home in Kaminoyama: Whole House 14 Guests,Zao Ski&Onsen,Yamagata,ZAO ORCHARD HOUSE offers a spacious holiday home in Kaminoyama, Japan. The property features a garden and free WiFi, ensuring a comfortable stay.
